description: Fix the S3 method dispatch issue in `evaluate_model()`: when called with an object of class `c("lm_result", "lm")`, R dispatches to `evaluate_model.lm` (from stats) instead of `evaluate_model.lm_result` because `lm_result` is not the first class in the vector. Reorder the class attribute so `lm_result` precedes `lm`.
